arts.ttl: When is Liverpool - Man City? How to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Liverpool - Man City will be played on Sunday December 1 at Anfield with kick off at 11:00 a.m. ET / 8:00 a.m. PT. Liverpool comes into this match in excellent form, having won their last eight games across all competitions.

arts.ttl: Fantasy Challenge: DOUBLE points for Man City and Liverpool stars
arts.sum: , sees Fantasy managers handed a budget of £44.0m and tasked with choosing a five-a-side team, armed with the knowledge that every player from the weekend’s heavyweight duel between Liverpool and Manchester City will earn double points. Amad (£4.9m) looks like a decent budget option for Manchester United's clash with Everton after back-to-back league assists, while Alejandro Garnacho (£6.4m) is behind only Haaland and Semenyo for total attempts over the last six Gameweeks, with 22.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka sends rivals Man City and Liverpool a warning after Arsenal's 5-2 thrashing of West Ham - as Mikel Arteta insists his title-chasing side have 'momentum'
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE AT THE LONDON STADIUM: Arsenal have now picked up three wins in the last week, putting five past Sporting Lisbon, as they put behind them a poor run of form.
